productDisplayName: Fila Men Drift White Sports Shoes
description: Gear up for those classy wins in this pair of fila Drift shoes. Designed for those who love those healthy runs and cross training, this pair of trainers is stylish and well cushioned, besides offering great traction. Team this with Sports apparel when hitting the trail, or simply pair it with jeans and tees for casual outings.Upper Meshed upper for maximum ventilation and durability Synthetic overlays for durability, added structure to the upper and midfoot support Reinforced overlay over heel cup for extra support to the backfoot Reinforced overlay over toe box for durability and added protection to the forefoot Symmetrical lace-up system for snug Fit and protection from blistering Synthetic laces for durability Padded tongue with synthetic upper overlay for durability and meshed fabric lining below for comfort and breathability Cushioned sockliner for in step comfort and snug fit Midsole EVA midsole for lightweight comfort and better shock absorption Cushioned EVA foam footbed for enhanced impact protection and comfort Outsole TPR durable rubber outsole for longer shoe life and comfort Flex grooves in forefoot and outsole for flexible foot movement and traction Rectangular and circular lugs along the forefoot and fore heel for enhanced durability, grip and support Horizontally grooved box at back heel for extra grip and traction Y-shaped vertical grooves with circular lugs along forefoot ending with a reinforced toe guard embeded on the upper in horizontal grooves for enhanced grip and traction Embossed branding on toe area Trusstic unit at midfoot arch for ergonomic support and traction Shoe careDo not machine washRub with soft, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
